subcodes.first_line: O thou Ameen of the Blessed Perfection! Praise be to God that thou hast covered the long distance and become my companion
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین جمال مبارک حمد خدا را که این مسافه بعیده طی نمودی تا در لندن و پاریس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @East and West; communication between East and West
